---
title: "Security"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Proactive cybersecurity and NIS2 compliance for modern organizations"
description: "Blue Team cybersecurity operations, NIS2 Directive compliance, CISO as a Service, threat hunting, and incident response. Protect your organization with chen.ist."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Proactive <span class="gr">Security</span></h1>
    <p>Monitor threats, respond to incidents, and stay compliant. All managed for you.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-squares">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Security, simplified</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four services working together to protect your business.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>SOC Monitoring</h3><p>24/7 surveillance and real-time threat detection.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-search"></i><h3>Threat Hunting</h3><p>Proactive search for threats that evade detection.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Gap analysis and compliance roadmaps for the EU directive.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i><h3>CISO as a Service</h3><p>Security leadership without a full-time hire.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg" alt="Security Operations Center"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Always watching.<br>Always ready.</h2>
        <p>Our SOC operates around the clock with open-source tools you can audit. We detect, investigate, and respond — so you can focus on your business.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Talk to our team</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/analyst-monitors.webp" alt="Compliance monitoring"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>NIS2 compliance.<br>From gap to green.</h2>
        <p>The directive is enforceable now. We take you from scoping through full compliance — with board-ready documentation at every step.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Check your NIS2 status</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/lock-keyboard.webp" alt="Infrastructure"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>When it happens.<br>You'll be ready.</h2>
        <p>We build, test, and maintain your incident response plan. Every phase documented. Every role defined. NIS2's 24-hour reporting — covered.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Build your IR plan</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-mountains">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">197</div><div class="m-nl">Days to detect (avg)</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">&lt;24h</div><div class="m-nl">Our response time</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 10M</div><div class="m-nl">Max NIS2 fine</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Get started with a<br>free assessment</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at where you stand.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book your assessment</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Report in 5 days
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
